title: EmergencyEvent
description: A critical safety or operational event requiring immediate response, such as an accident, vehicle breakdown, or passenger emergency.

emergencyType.description: Type of emergency (e.g. ACCIDENT, BREAKDOWN, MEDICAL)

severity.description: Severity level of the emergency (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL)

reportedAt.description: Timestamp when the emergency was reported

validity.description: Time period during which the alert is active
